_comment: Vocareum course config for 'Hands on: Agent Apps Workshop' (lab 216857, Marketing org). Classic / framework-native model, cloned-by-copy from the Agent Bricks lab. The framework's workspace_init() assigns a unique UC metastore + a PRO serverless warehouse, then runs the agent_apps_setup workspace_setup notebook AS THE PRIVILEGED IDENTITY on serverless job compute (host/token injected as notebook params). content (agent_apps_lab) is copied into each student's home. Everything ships from /voc/private/courseware/ only — no /scripts or /voc/private/python hooks.
